form.formComment: Scored by one length last time (20.16) in a Grade 5 over 350m at this track. Has one win and three placings from eight starts from the draw. Looks suited here and rates a leading chance.

form.formComment: Surprised on debut at Temora to win by 2 lengths in 19.00, beating Nangar County. Last start finished last on April 8 over 330m at Temora behind Paw Hart beaten 16 lengths (19.91) in a Grade 5. Not far away last start. Right in the mix again.
